namespace Isa\Sdk\Core;
class BootstrapSignature
    public function __construct(/** JSON body exactly as sent on the wire. Bytes signed verbatim. */ public readonly string $serializedBody, /** `<ts>.<METHOD> <path>.<body>` — the HMAC input. */ public readonly string $canonical, /** Lowercase hex HMAC-SHA256 over canonical, keyed by licenseKey. */ public readonly string $hex, /** `ISA-Signature: t=<ts>,v1=<hex>` — ready-to-set header value. */ public readonly string $header,)

=== RapidSign/Documents/Service.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\RapidSign\Documents;
class Service
    public function __construct(private HttpTransport $transport, private Clock $clock,)
    public function send(SendRequest $request) : Envelope
    public function get(string $signId, ?string $sessionId = null, ?int $deadlineMs = null) : Signature
    public function awaitSignature(string $signId, ?AwaitOpts $opts = null) : Signature
    public function download(string $signId, ?string $sessionId = null) : string
    public function cancel(string $signId, CancelRequest $request) : void

=== RapidSign/Exception/RapidSignException.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\RapidSign\Exception;
class RapidSignException extends RuntimeException
    public function __construct(string $message, private readonly string $errorCode, private readonly ?int $httpStatus = null, private readonly ?string $requestId = null, private readonly bool $retryable = false, private readonly ?int $retryAfterMs = null, private readonly ?string $param = null, private readonly ?string $docUrl = null, ?Throwable $previous = null,)
    public function code() : string
    public function httpStatus() : ?int
    public function requestId() : ?string
    public function retryable() : bool
    public function retryAfterMs() : ?int
    public function param() : ?string
    public function docUrl() : ?string

=== Zyins/Auth.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class Auth
    public function __construct(public string $token, public string $scheme = self::SCHEME_BEARER, // Session-mode credentials carry the HMAC signing secret here; // null for Bearer / License modes. Previously this field was // dropped at construction — the proxy.call boundary now requires // it so the surgical fix is to preserve it through Auth. public ?string $sessionSecret = null,)
    public function license(string $keycode, string $email) : self
    public function session(string $sid, string $sessionSecret) : self
    public function isSession() : bool
    public function isRecognizedPrefix() : bool
    public function isLive() : bool
    public function isTest() : bool
    public function authorizationHeader() : string
    public const PREFIX_LIVE
    public const PREFIX_TEST
    public const SCHEME_BEARER
    public const SCHEME_LICENSE
    public const SCHEME_SESSION

    public function kind() : string
    public function baseUrl() : string
    public function at(string $baseUrl) : self

    public function kind() : string
    public function baseUrl() : string
    public function default() : self
    public function at(string $proxyOrigin) : self
    public const PRODUCTION_ORIGIN

=== Zyins/Reference/ConceptInterface.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference;
interface ConceptInterface
    public function id() : ?string
    public function name() : string
    public function kind() : string
    public function isKnown() : bool
    public function inputText() : string
    public function conditions(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array
    public function medications(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array
    public function equals(ConceptInterface $other) : bool

=== Zyins/Reference/ConceptKind.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference;
class ConceptKind
    public const MEDICATION
    public const CONDITION
    public const UNKNOWN

=== Zyins/Reference/ConceptsMatcher.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference;

    public function __construct(private readonly ?ReferenceBundleCache $cache = null)
    public function match(string $text, ?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null) : ConceptInterface
    public function matchMany(array $texts, ?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null) : array

namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference;

    public function match(string $text, ?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null) : ConceptInterface
    public function matchMany(array $texts, ?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null) : array
    public function autocomplete(string $text, ?AutocompleteOptions $options = null, ?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null,) : array
    public function list(?DatasetBundleV3 $bundle = null) : array

=== Zyins/Reference/Internal/ConceptHandle.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference\Internal;
class ConceptHandle implements ConceptInterface
    public function __construct(protected readonly ?string $id, protected readonly string $name, protected readonly string $kind, protected readonly bool $isKnown, protected readonly string $inputText, protected readonly ?ReferenceIndex $index,)
    public function id() : ?string
    public function name() : string
    public function kind() : string
    public function isKnown() : bool
    public function inputText() : string
    public function conditions(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array
    public function medications(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array
    public function equals(ConceptInterface $other) : bool
    public function knownMedication(ReferenceIndex $index, string $id, string $inputText) : KnownMedicationConcept
    public function knownCondition(ReferenceIndex $index, string $id, string $inputText) : KnownConditionConcept
    public function unknown(string $inputText) : UnknownConcept

=== Zyins/Reference/Internal/KnownConditionConcept.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference\Internal;
class KnownConditionConcept extends ConceptHandle implements ConditionConceptInterface
    public function __construct(string $id, string $name, string $inputText, ReferenceIndex $index)
    public function medications(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array

=== Zyins/Reference/Internal/KnownMedicationConcept.php ===

    public function __construct(string $id, string $name, string $inputText, ReferenceIndex $index)
    public function conditions(string $sort = Sort::MOST_COMMON_FIRST) : array

=== Zyins/Reference/Internal/UnknownConcept.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference\Internal;
class UnknownConcept extends ConceptHandle
    public function __construct(string $inputText)

=== Zyins/Reference/Internal/V3Coercion.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Reference\Internal;
class V3Coercion
    public function asString(mixed $v) : string
    public function asInt(mixed $v) : int
    public function asNullableInt(mixed $v) : ?int
    public function asBool(mixed $v) : bool
    public function carrier(mixed $raw) : V3OfferCarrier
    public function product(mixed $raw) : V3OfferProduct
    public function amount(mixed $raw) : V3Amount
    public function money(mixed $raw) : V3Money
    public function eligibility(mixed $raw) : V3Eligibility
    public function premium(mixed $raw) : ?V3Premium
    public function encodeRequestBody(array $body, string $operation) : string
    public function decodeResponseBody(string $body, string $operation) : array
    public function retryAttempts(RawResponse $raw) : int
    public function pricingRow(mixed $raw) : V3PricingRow
    public function offer(mixed $raw) : V3Offer

=== Zyins/SignRequest.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class SignRequest
    public function canonicalString(string $method, string $path, string $body, string $timestamp, string $sessionId) : string
    public function formatTimestamp(DateTimeInterface $now) : string
    public function sign(string $method, string $path, string $body, string $sessionId, string $sessionSecret, ?DateTimeInterface $now = null) : array

=== Zyins/Transport.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class Transport
    public function __construct(private ClientInterface $http, private Auth $auth, private IdempotencyKeySource $keys, private string $baseUrl, private string $apiVersion, private string $userAgent, private DebugLogger $logger = new DebugLogger(),)
    public function post(string $path, array $body, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : DecodedResponse
    public function postWithRaw(string $path, array $body, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : array
    public function postEnvelope(string $path, array $body, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : array
    public function postBootstrap(string $path, array $body, ?string $deviceId = null, ?RequestOptions $options = null,) : DecodedResponse
    public function get(string $path, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : DecodedResponse
    public function getEnvelope(string $path, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : array
    public function getWithRaw(string $path, ?RequestOptions $options = null) : array
    public function sendRaw(string $method, string $path, ?string $rawBody, RequestOptions $options,) : RawResponse
    public function exceptionFromRaw(RawResponse $raw, ?string $sentIdempotencyKey = null) : IsaException
    public const DEFAULT_BASE_URL

=== Zyins/Usage/Service.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins\Usage;
class Service
    public function __construct(private Transport $transport)
    public function summary(?RequestOptions $options = null) : array
    public function summaryEnvelope(?RequestOptions $options = null) : array

=== Zyins/Uuid4IdempotencyKeySource.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class Uuid4IdempotencyKeySource implements IdempotencyKeySource
    public function next() : string

=== Zyins/Weight.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class Weight
    public function fromPounds(int $pounds) : self

=== Zyins/ZyInsClient.php ===
namespace Isa\Sdk\Zyins;
class ZyInsClient
    public function __construct(string|Auth $token, ?ClientInterface $httpClient = null, ?IdempotencyKeySource $idempotency = null, string $baseUrl = Transport::DEFAULT_BASE_URL, string $apiVersion = self::DEFAULT_API_VERSION, ?string $userAgent = null, ?LoggerInterface $logger = null, ?CaseStorage $caseStorage = null, array $apiVersionMap = [], ?AutocorrectorInterface $autocorrector = null, ?MatchAlgorithmInterface $matchAlgorithm = null, ?AutocompleteAlgorithmInterface $autocompleteAlgorithm = null,)
    public function withBearer(?string $token = null, ?LoggerInterface $logger = null, ?CaseStorage $caseStorage = null, array $apiVersionMap = [],) : self
    public function withLicense(?string $keycode = null, ?string $email = null, ?LoggerInterface $logger = null, ?CaseStorage $caseStorage = null, array $apiVersionMap = [],) : self
    public function withSession(?string $sessionId = null, ?string $sessionSecret = null, ?LoggerInterface $logger = null, ?CaseStorage $caseStorage = null, array $apiVersionMap = [],) : self
    public const DEFAULT_API_VERSION
